name: scrapling
description: High-performance adaptive web scraping with anti-bot bypass. Provides both MCP server integration (recommended for zero-code scraping via Claude Code/Desktop tools) and Python library skill (for custom scraping pipelines). Handles Cloudflare protection, JavaScript rendering, adaptive element tracking that survives website redesigns, and parallel batch operations. Critical for accelerandoAI article extraction and other web data projects.
author: Jonathan (based on D4Vinci/Scrapling)
use_cases: accelerandoAI: X/Twitter article extraction for cliff notes video generation
Production scrapers that need resilience to website redesigns (adaptive mode)
Batch parallel URL scraping with concurrent operations
MCP integration: Zero-code web scraping via Claude Code/Desktop tools

mcp_server.description: Use Scrapling MCP server for zero-code integration with Claude Code/Desktop
mcp_server.when_to_use: Quick data extraction, autonomous Claude scraping strategy, minimal custom processing

python_skill.description: Use Scrapling Python library for custom scraping pipelines
python_skill.when_to_use: Complex data transformation, database/API integration, accelerandoAI workflows
